pirType.description: legacy enum (ignored when params.algorithm is set); kept for proto_compat

assume_non_colluding.description: two-server DoublePIR REQUIRES caller to certify non-collusion

hint_path.description: secondary may also persist the received hint for cold-restart speedup

hint_role.description: secondary ReceiveHint from peer_nodes[0] (the primary) in lieu of HintGen

queryIndices.description: decimal row indices to retrieve from the dataset (same as primary)

outputFullFilename.description: secondary saves its slice; full result reassembled across both peers
